notes: v2.4.12 — Shop terminals: badge sign-in for any active employee with Acting-as attribution, 3-min idle timeout, opt-in 1-hr extension. QR Scanner: unified identity, server-side search/filters. Tickets: two-way Teams integration with attachments and comments, admin-only edit/delete, internal-note privacy. Planner: jump-to-source-board links, via-Group/Board chips, in-app attachment previews, completion percentage on create. Security & Monitoring: full inline-edit overhaul — every field saves without page reload. POAs: milestone Save now persists, Title and Assigned-To added. AS9100: IMS list lookups show actual values. RP Queue: rebuilt scheduler (drag/resize/drop directly on timeline, one-bar-per-group, 24h completion grace, duplicate-card prevention at DB layer), inline project/build edit, N-of-M tracking, auto-add resumes Monday May 18. CNC: duplicates impossible at DB layer. Eight schema migrations (172-179).
